calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearling this day for Settlement Hearing.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Plaintiff: Chuck Louie present with counsel, Kevin C. Lin, Esq.
Defendant: Geraldine Chang in pro per.
Case Did not settle, Trial Date stands.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geraldine Chang, propria persona, defendant and moving party.
Kevin C. Lin, Esq., Au & Yee, LLP, 415-777-1688, for plaintiff and opposing party Chuck Louie.
*Appearances and the Court adopted its tentative ruling --DEFENDANT GERALDINE CHANG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- overruled with 5 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Reporter: Candice Yount, CSR #2737 (DEW/301/CW)
